overview.description: The FT Vest US Equity Max Buffer ETF-February (FEBM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a predetermined investment outcome over a one-year period. The exposure is reset annually in February FEBM was launched on Feb 21, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.
